overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing characters walking through a neon-lit futuristic city center. The sequence follows pedestrians crossing streets, ascending elevated walkways near a massive statue, and navigating through covered urban underpasses with vibrant holographic advertisements.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway transitioning to street crossing

events.description: exits covered walkway onto open street crosswalk with glowing road markings
futuristic vehicles pass by on the road while crossing

agents.ego_description: walking with a group of pedestrians across a neon-lit city street toward a plaza

notable_agents.action: futuristic white car driving along the street
pedestrian in white tank top walking alongside the group

entered.detail: metal overhead walkway with red support pillars and purple neon lighting
tall building with holographic advertisements and glass facade
pedestrian crossing with glowing green text and yellow stripes
red and black striped barrier post with illuminated base

segments.scene_description: The segment begins under a covered walkway with neon purple lighting and red structural pillars. The camera follows pedestrians as they exit onto a street crosswalk with glowing markings, crossing while futuristic vehicles pass by. The massive meditating statue becomes visible in the distance as they approach the plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza with massive statue and traditional Japanese-inspired architecture

events.description: enters the open plaza area dominated by the massive meditating statue
begins ascending teal-colored stairs toward elevated viewing platform

agents.ego_description: walking up stairs toward an elevated viewing platform near a massive statue with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white tank top with red bandana leading the way up the stairs

entered.detail: giant silver statue of a figure with multiple arms holding glowing purple orbs
pagoda-style structure with black roof and hanging red paper lanterns
trees with illuminated pink blossoms lining the plaza
teal colored stairs with metal railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The group enters an open plaza dominated by a massive silver meditating statue with glowing orbs. They approach a traditional Japanese gate with red lanterns and begin ascending a teal staircase. Cherry blossom trees with pink lighting line the area as they climb toward an elevated platform.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated observation deck with panoramic city views

events.description: camera pans upward to reveal full height of statue and surrounding skyscrapers
view shifts to show hexagonal building with purple neon trim and floating transit platforms

agents.ego_description: standing on elevated platform looking up at the massive statue and surrounding neon-lit skyscrapers, then panning to view the cityscape

entered.detail: futuristic hexagonal structure with purple neon outline and glass windows containing passengers
elevated transport platform suspended by cables with visible passengers
large digital advertisements on building facades displaying animated content

segments.scene_description: From the elevated platform, the camera pans upward to reveal the full scale of the meditating statue against towering skyscrapers. The view shifts to showcase a distinctive hexagonal building with purple neon trim and floating transit platforms. The surrounding cityscape features numerous holographic billboards and futuristic architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with commercial storefronts

events.description: begins descending stairs from elevated platform into underpass
enters covered underpass area with concrete pillars and reduced natural lighting

agents.ego_description: walking down stairs into a covered urban underpass alongside other pedestrians with various hair colors

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright pink hair walking down the stairs
pedestrian with blue hair descending ahead of the group

entered.detail: gray concrete pillars, ceiling with exposed ventilation ducts and pipes
illuminated billboard showing anime-style character advertisement
stenciled artwork and murals on concrete walls
shops with neon signs and illuminated entrances

segments.scene_description: The group descends from the elevated platform into a covered concrete underpass. The environment shifts to gray concrete pillars, exposed ventilation ducts, and artificial lighting. They pass by a large digital screen displaying advertisements and walls with graffiti art while navigating through moderate pedestrian traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial pedestrian underpass with food vendors and shops

events.description: passes by food vendor stall with illuminated umbrella and zebra-print kiosk
exits underpass into semi-open street area with visible road markings

agents.ego_description: walking through the underpass passing various pedestrians, street vendors, and ascending stairs

notable_agents.action: street vendor standing near food cart with striped umbrella
pedestrian in red cap and brown jacket walking up stairs

entered.detail: food stall with black and white striped umbrella and warm lighting
small shop with black and white zebra striped facade
stairs with purple neon edge lighting and teal structural elements

segments.scene_description: Walking through the underpass, the camera passes a food vendor cart with a striped umbrella and a zebra-print kiosk. The area features stairs with purple neon trim and various commercial storefronts. The segment ends as the group approaches an opening leading back to the street level with visible road markings and additional neon signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit urban walkway through a monumental plaza and back down into a gritty commercial underpass. It begins under a covered walkway with purple lighting and red pillars, following pedestrians across a glowing street crosswalk as a massive meditating statue emerges in the distance. As the group enters the open plaza, the scene shifts toward a traditional Japanese gate and pink-lit cherry blossom trees, ascending a teal staircase to an elevated platform that reveals the full scale of the statue against a backdrop of hexagonal buildings and holographic billboards. The camera then descends from this height into a covered concrete underpass, where the vibrant colors give way to gray pillars, exposed ventilation ducts, and graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the movement passes a striped food vendor cart and zebra-print kiosk before approaching an opening that leads back toward the neon signage of the street level.
